title: The History of Blockchain Technology
description: A chronological timeline showing the key milestones, concepts, and events that led to the development and evolution of blockchain technology.
elements: 1991: Haber & Stornetta propose a cryptographically secured chain of blocks
1998: Nick Szabo conceptualizes 'Bit Gold', a decentralized digital currency
2008: Satoshi Nakamoto publishes the Bitcoin Whitepaper
2009: Genesis Block of Bitcoin is mined, launching the first blockchain
2013: Vitalik Buterin proposes Ethereum, introducing smart contracts
~2016: Rise of alternative blockchains and enterprise exploration
relationships: Shows the chronological progression of ideas and implementations, where each event builds upon or is influenced by previous concepts, culminating in the modern ecosystem of blockchain platforms.
